svg.text: Print at 100% scale / “Actual size” — never “fit to page”. Check the calibration square before trusting anything on this sheet.
1. Measure this square with a ruler.
It must be exactly 50 × 50 mm — if not, your
Works on A4 and US Letter paper.
R1 — ruler (mm): plug length, widths, thicknesses, hand width
2. Plug silhouettes (1:1) — hold your plug against W (wide side) and T (thin side); if it matches, pick that preset in Step 1.
3. F1 / F2 — finger circles: smallest circle your middle finger passes through, minus 5 = finger width.
openscad-plug-puller · measuring stencil sheet · scale 1:1 · prefer plastic? print stl/Measuring-Stencil/
